title: 4 things a man of God builds alone that no one can give him
caption:
Nobody hands you these four things.

Talent can be recognized. Connections can be introduced. But there are things a man of God only gets by showing up — in the hidden hours, with no audience, when it would be easier not to.

A word worth keeping. A body he governs. A mind he guards. A prayer life that's real — not the version he shows, the version he lives.

Grace is free. A man still has to get up in the morning.

"Do not grow weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up." — Galatians 6:9

Nobody builds the man for you. You build him in the quiet, one rep at a time.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS. The Daily Anchor is one practice, every morning.
